name: perplexity-mcp
description: Perplexity — web search, grounded AI answers, step-by-step reasoning, plus perplexity.ai/finance scrape (Notable Price Movement narratives, quotes, analyst ratings). Cookies auto-refresh on SessionStart via `cass cookies refresh`.

mcpKey.title: MCP bearer token
mcpKey.description: MCP bearer token for this service (managed by `cass refresh-keys`).
